name: chem1_start
note: Chemistry experiment intro, 12-frame start clip @10FPS (1.2s — frame count padded 1.25x so realtime playback feels like 0.8x speed). She pulls a glass Erlenmeyer flask and a small beaker out from behind her back and presents them with a proud 'ta-dah!'. PROP RULES (repeat in every frame where the props are visible): the cone-shaped Erlenmeyer flask filled with glowing vivid magenta-pink liquid is ALWAYS in the hand on the LEFT side of the image; the small straight-sided glass beaker filled with vivid cyan-blue liquid is ALWAYS in the hand on the RIGHT side of the image; both vessels are drawn with an opaque pale blue-white glass tint (NEVER transparent, the background must never show through the glass); liquid levels never change between frames (cartoon logic). LAST FRAME must exactly match frame 0 of chem1_loop: upright stance, flask held at chest height on the LEFT side of the image, beaker raised near shoulder height on the RIGHT side of the image.
frames: Pose: relaxed neutral stand easing into mischief: feet close together under her hips, both arms swinging back behind her body, hands disappearing behind her back, shoulders rising slightly, leaning forward a touch. A small mischievous closed-mouth smirk, eyes glancing sideways playfully. No props visible yet. The small lemon-slice hair clip stays on the same side of her bangs as in the reference image, do not mirror the character.

Pose: winding up: both hands fully hidden behind her back, elbows poking out at her sides, chest puffed, body rocking back on her heels, chin tucked with a barely-contained grin, one eyebrow raised, cheeks flushed with excitement. Feet close together. No props visible. The small lemon-slice hair clip stays on the same side of her bangs as in the reference image, do not mirror the character.

Pose: the reveal begins: both arms swinging out from behind her back, elbows still bent, hands just emerging at her hips — the hand on the LEFT side of the image gripping the neck of a cone-shaped glass Erlenmeyer flask filled with glowing vivid magenta-pink liquid, the hand on the RIGHT side of the image holding a small straight-sided glass beaker filled with vivid cyan-blue liquid. Both vessels drawn with an opaque pale blue-white glass tint, never transparent. Mouth opening into an excited grin, eyes bright. Feet close together. The small lemon-slice hair clip stays on the same side of her bangs as in the reference image, do not mirror the character.

Pose: arms sweeping forward and upward in a wide arc, the Erlenmeyer flask of glowing magenta-pink liquid rising past waist height on the LEFT side of the image and the beaker of cyan-blue liquid rising on the RIGHT side of the image, liquid levels unchanged, both vessels opaque pale-tinted glass. Body leaning forward eagerly, mouth open in a growing grin, eyes sparkling. Feet close together. The small lemon-slice hair clip stays on the same side of her bangs as in the reference image, do not mirror the character.

Pose: the arc continuing upward: both arms now lifted to chest height and still rising outward, the flask of magenta-pink liquid on the LEFT side of the image and the beaker of cyan-blue liquid on the RIGHT side of the image tilting slightly outward for display, liquid levels unchanged, opaque pale-tinted glass. Heels just starting to lift off the floor, grin widening into an open-mouth 'ta-dah!', hair beginning to bounce. Feet close together. The small lemon-slice hair clip stays on the same side of her bangs as in the reference image, do not mirror the character.

Pose: 'TA-DAH!' peak presentation, key frame: standing on tiptoes, both arms extended out and up at shoulder height presenting the props to the viewer — Erlenmeyer flask of glowing magenta-pink liquid held high on the LEFT side of the image, beaker of cyan-blue liquid held high on the RIGHT side of the image, both opaque pale-tinted glass, liquid levels unchanged. Huge proud open-mouth smile, eyes squeezed into happy arcs, a few tiny star sparkles around her head, hair bouncing up. Feet together on tiptoe. The small lemon-slice hair clip stays on the same side of her bangs as in the reference image, do not mirror the character.

Pose: holding the ta-dah presentation with a small bounce: heels settling back toward the floor, both arms still spread wide presenting the flask (LEFT side of the image, glowing magenta-pink liquid) and the beaker (RIGHT side of the image, cyan-blue liquid), both opaque pale-tinted glass, liquid levels unchanged. Beaming open-mouth smile, eyes open and shining, sparkles fading. Feet close together. The small lemon-slice hair clip stays on the same side of her bangs as in the reference image, do not mirror the character.

Pose: one more happy beat before work mode: heels flat on the floor, arms still presenting but relaxing, elbows softening — flask of magenta-pink liquid on the LEFT side of the image and beaker of cyan-blue liquid on the RIGHT side of the image drifting slightly inward, liquid levels unchanged, opaque pale-tinted glass. Smile settling from beaming to warmly pleased, eyes open, last sparkle fading. Feet close together. The small lemon-slice hair clip stays on the same side of her bangs as in the reference image, do not mirror the character.

Pose: transitioning to work mode: both arms drawing inward toward her body, elbows bending — the Erlenmeyer flask of magenta-pink liquid coming down toward chest height on the LEFT side of the image, the beaker of cyan-blue liquid coming toward shoulder height on the RIGHT side of the image, both opaque pale-tinted glass, liquid levels unchanged. Smile settling into an eager focused grin, eyes turning toward the flask. Feet close together, flat on the floor. The small lemon-slice hair clip stays on the same side of her bangs as in the reference image, do not mirror the character.

Pose: settling into the mixing stance: the Erlenmeyer flask of glowing magenta-pink liquid held steady at chest height in the hand on the LEFT side of the image, the beaker of cyan-blue liquid raised to shoulder height in the hand on the RIGHT side of the image, both opaque pale-tinted glass, liquid levels unchanged. Head tilting down slightly to look at the flask, cute focused expression with a small determined pout. Feet close together, body upright. The small lemon-slice hair clip stays on the same side of her bangs as in the reference image, do not mirror the character.

Pose: final micro-adjustment before the experiment: same stance — flask of magenta-pink liquid steady at chest height on the LEFT side of the image, beaker of cyan-blue liquid at shoulder height on the RIGHT side of the image, both opaque pale-tinted glass, liquid levels unchanged — with her shoulders relaxing and chin lifting a touch, eyes fixed on the flask, tip of her tongue peeking out in concentration. Feet close together, body upright. The small lemon-slice hair clip stays on the same side of her bangs as in the reference image, do not mirror the character.

Pose: LOOP-READY base pose, must match the first frame of the loop clip exactly: standing upright with feet close together under her hips, the cone-shaped Erlenmeyer flask filled with glowing vivid magenta-pink liquid held level at chest height in the hand on the LEFT side of the image, the small beaker of vivid cyan-blue liquid held at shoulder height in the hand on the RIGHT side of the image, both vessels opaque pale-tinted glass, liquid levels unchanged. Calm focused expression, small smile, eyes on the flask. The small lemon-slice hair clip stays on the same side of her bangs as in the reference image, do not mirror the character.
